config.name: tg_natural_daughters_eps027_nu0001
config.description: TG k=1 + natural k=2 daughters at (2,0,2) and (0,2,2) modes. These are the actual solenoidal k=2 modes generated by TG nonlinearity, NOT TG k=2 at (2,2,2). More resonant → potentially more efficient cascade. Best so far: 565 with TG k=2.
